commentary_text: The model favors Panama at 66%, while the market favors Ghana at 46%. The largest single gap appears on the Ghana win probability, where the market is 36 percentage points higher than the model. This divergence could reflect information about recent form, injuries, or lineup changes unavailable to the model at its last update, or it may indicate the market is pricing Ghana substantially differently based on factors the statistical framework does not capture. The dashboard presents this as a signal of genuine disagreement rather than a verdict on which assessment is more reliable.
